category_sources: source_facts.description says Simple, elegant, Pythonic functional programming; official GitHub README says Coconut is a Python variant with functional programming features.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is coconut; official GitHub README and documentation use Coconut.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to Coconut tutorial, documentation, and FAQ on coconut.readthedocs.io.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub README says Coconut is developed on GitHub and the repository is evhub/coconut.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README describe Coconut as a Python variant adding functional programming features.
